results.title: Madurai Hosts 6th Leg of Kauvery Hospital-TNSTC Veterans Tennis Tournament 2026
results.description: Madurai (Tamil Nadu) [India], July 6: The VIth Leg of the Kauvery Hospital-Tamil Nadu Senior Tennis Club (TNSTC) Veterans Tennis Tournament 2026 was held at the Madurai Union Club from June 26 to 28, featuring Singles and Doubles events across seven age categories (40+, 50+, 55+, 60+, 65+, 70+, and 75+).

results.title: CM Devendra Fadnavis reviews rain situation, activates 24X7 control room
results.description: Amid forecasts of heavy rainfall and possible flooding across Maharashtra, CM Devendra Fadnavis urged citizens to avoid non-essential travel, stay alert, and rely only on official information. The state has activated 24X7 emergency control rooms and helplines

results.title: IMD issues red alert for Mumbai, Thane and Raigad; predicts more rains
results.description: According to the IMD, isolated places in the three districts are likely to experience intense rainfall along with gusty winds reaching speeds of 60 to 70 kmph

results.title: Loud silences, unfiltered thoughts, quiet strength: 25-year-old Gurgaon-based product manager shares 6 lessons living alone taught him. ‘I hope everyone gets to meet themselves’
results.description: Moving out alone offers more than just independence; it's a profound teacher of self-reliance. Product manager Shivank Goel shared how solitude revealed the power of silence for reflection, the necessity of daily responsibilities, and the gradual conquering of small fears. This journey of living solo, he found, ultimately leads to a deeper understanding of oneself and personal boundaries, proving to be a vital experience for growth.

results.title: Villagers and family members staging a sit-in protest

results.title: SEBI New Rules on Mutual Funds: All schemes divided into 5 categories; 41 schemes of one category closed | EXPLAINED
results.description: SEBI New Rules on Mutual Funds: To keep up with the dynamic investment environment and the opportunities that are emerging across asset classes, SEBI has now replaced Clause 2.6 with a new framework for the categorisation and streamlining of mutual fund schemes.

results.title: Vivo G5i and Vivo G5z Launched
results.description: The popular Chinese smartphone brand Vivo has officially launched the latest Vivo G5i and Vivo G5z in the markets of China with similar specifications.
